Statement: Three-phase power service (DEL-015-01) must be complete and energized before equipment circuits can be energized
EvidenceQuote: Three-Phase Power Service (DEL-015-01) installed and main distribution panel energized
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-03 and Specification REQ-015-04-009. Hard gate for energization.

Statement: IFC Electrical Drawings (DEL-004-02) must be issued, P.Eng.-stamped, before installation proceeds
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-01 and Specification REQ-015-04-008. Defines circuit layouts and wiring methods.

Statement: IFC Panel Schedules (DEL-004-06) must be issued, P.Eng.-stamped, before installation proceeds
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-01. Defines breaker ratings and panel assignments.

Statement: Electrical Calculation Package (DEL-004-08) required for conductor sizing and load calculations
EvidenceQuote: Electrical Calculation Package (DEL-004-08) completed confirming conductor sizing
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-02. Required for conductor sizing.

Statement: Crane manufacturer electrical requirements (voltage/amperage/supply method) must be received from DEL-016-01 before crane circuit design can be finalized
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-05; Datasheet notes B-001 confirm TBD pending crane procurement. Crane circuit ratings cannot be determined without this data.

Statement: Building structure must be complete before crane runway power supply can be installed
EvidenceQuote: Building structure and crane support structure complete … required before crane runway power supply installation
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-04. Applies specifically to crane circuit rough-in (crane runway must be in place).

Statement: Crane support structure (crane runway beams) must be in place before crane runway power supply installation
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-04 referencing DEL-002-07 (crane supports). Note: DEL-002-07 is a design deliverable (drawing set); the physical construction of crane supports falls under PKG-011. Both are needed.

Statement: Exhaust fan scope boundary between DEL-015-04 (SOW-0066) and PKG-013 (SOW-0038/SOW-0039) must be clarified; requires scope confirmation from mechanical contractor
EvidenceQuote: Confirm with the Project Manager and Mechanical Contractor (PKG-013) which exhaust fans are supplied under SOW-0066
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface in Procedure Step 1.4 and Guidance CON-015-04-001. Unresolved scope boundary affects circuit count for exhaust fans.

Statement: Equipment nameplate data for compressor, fire hose pump, pressure washer, exhaust fans, and overhead door operators must be confirmed before IFC design finalization
EvidenceQuote: Equipment specifications confirmed for compressor (40A), fire hose pump (70A), pressure washer (70A), exhaust fan(s), and overhead door operators
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-06 and Datasheet notes B-002, B-003. Load data required for final conductor sizing and breaker selection.

Statement: Alberta Safety Code electrical permit must be obtained before equipment power circuit work begins
EvidenceQuote: Alberta Safety Code electrical permit obtained
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite in Procedure P-07. Regulatory constraint.

Statement: Functional test records (Phase 6) are provided to commissioning agent for inclusion in DEL-020-01 building systems commissioning package
EvidenceQuote: Provide functional test records (Steps 6.2-6.7) to the Commissioning Agent … for inclusion in … DEL-020-01
Notes: FACT. Explicit handover in Procedure Step 7.3.

Notes: ASSUMPTION. Declared in _DEPENDENCIES.md; no explicit artifact transfer described in source production documents. Preserved as declared edge.
